config.proxyUrl: Proxy server URL (e.g., http://proxy.example.com:8080) for VSCode, Git, npm, and integrated terminal proxy settings
config.pollingInterval: Auto mode polling interval in seconds (10-300). How often to check for system proxy changes.
config.detectionSourcePriority: Priority order for proxy detection sources. Sources are tried in order until one succeeds.
config.maxRetries: Maximum number of retries for proxy detection when it fails.
config.testInterval: Proxy connection test interval in seconds (Auto mode only). Range: 30-600 seconds. Default: 60 seconds.
config.autoTestEnabled: Enable automatic proxy connection testing in Auto mode. When enabled, proxy connectivity is tested periodically.
config.enableFallback: Enable fallback to manual proxy when system proxy is not detected (Auto mode only). When enabled, if no system proxy is detected, the extension will try to use the manually configured proxy as a fallback.
config.enableFallback.description: When enabled, if no system proxy is detected in Auto mode, the extension will try to use the manually configured proxy as a fallback.
config.showProxyUrl: Show proxy URL in the status bar
config.targets.vscode: Apply proxy to VSCode settings (http.proxy). Affects VSCode's own network requests and built-in extensions.
config.targets.git: Apply proxy to Git global configuration (http.proxy / https.proxy in ~/.gitconfig). Affects all git operations system-wide.
config.targets.npm: Apply proxy to npm configuration (proxy / https-proxy in ~/.npmrc). Affects all npm operations system-wide.
config.targets.terminal: Inject proxy environment variables (HTTP_PROXY, HTTPS_PROXY, etc.) into newly created integrated terminals.
config.syncEnabled: Enable synchronization between multiple VSCode/Cursor instances. When enabled, proxy settings are shared across all instances.
config.syncInterval: Synchronization check interval in milliseconds (100-5000). How often to check for changes from other instances.
prompt.initialSetup: How would you like to configure proxy settings?
prompt.noManualProxy: No manual proxy configured. Set one up now?
prompt.couldNotDetect: Couldn't detect system proxy. Set up manually?
prompt.proxyWorks: Proxy works! How would you like to use it?
warning.noSystemProxyDetected: No system proxy detected. Switching to Off mode.
warning.noSystemProxyCheck: No system proxy detected. Check your system/browser proxy settings.
warning.unableToPersist: Unable to persist proxy settings. Settings will be lost when VSCode restarts.
warning.detectionFailed: System proxy detection failed. You can configure a proxy manually.
warning.detectionFailedRetries: System proxy detection failed after multiple retries. Check your system/browser proxy settings.
warning.invalidFormat: Detected system proxy has invalid format: {url}
suggestion.verifyUrl: Verify the proxy URL is correct
suggestion.checkServer: Check if the proxy server is running and accessible
suggestion.checkNetwork: Ensure your network allows proxy connections
suggestion.checkFirewall: Verify firewall settings are not blocking the proxy
suggestion.testDifferentApp: Test the proxy with a different application to verify it works
suggestion.validHostname: Ensure hostname contains only alphanumeric characters, dots, and hyphens
suggestion.checkOutputLog: Check the output log for details
suggestion.invalidFormatDetected: The detected system proxy has an invalid format
suggestion.configureManualInstead: Try configuring a manual proxy instead
suggestion.verifyServerRunning: Verify the proxy server is running
statusbar.tooltip.title: Proxy Configuration
statusbar.tooltip.autoModeNoProxy: Auto Mode - No system proxy detected
statusbar.tooltip.autoOff: Auto Mode - Proxy temporarily disabled. System proxy or fallback proxy will be used when available.
statusbar.tooltip.autoFallback: Auto Mode - Using manual proxy as fallback: {url}
fallback.usingManualProxy: System proxy not detected, using manual proxy: {url}
sync.notification.conflictResolved: Settings conflict resolved. Latest change has been applied.
